summary: Iteration 103: Tested new compliance file sections (recruitment_record, health_competency, admin_forms) with form-type requirement rows. All backend tests pass (15/15). Frontend UI correctly displays all new sections with proper delivery mode badges, status indicators, and action buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New compliance file sections fully functional. Backend returns 3 new sections: recruitment_record (4 rows), health_competency (2 rows), admin_forms (3 rows). Form-type rows have row_type='form', delivery_mode, status, allowed_actions. CV row has row_type='evidence'. Frontend FormRequirementRow component renders rows with expandable action buttons based on state.

backend_new_sections.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file returns recruitment_record, health_competency, admin_forms sections

recruitment_record_section.details: Contains 4 rows: interview_record, application_form, cv, recruitment_checklist

form_row_type.details: Form rows have row_type='form', CV row has row_type='evidence'

delivery_mode_badges.details: Sendable, Admin Only, Hybrid badges display correctly based on delivery_mode

status_indicators.details: Verified, Draft, Awaiting Review, Not Started status badges display correctly

blocker_text.details: Red blocker text shows for incomplete blocking requirements (e.g., Induction)

optional_badge.details: Optional badge shows for equal_opportunities form

required_badge.details: Required badge shows for staff_health_questionnaire and induction

form_row_actions.details: Expanded form rows show View, PDF, Verify, Reject, History buttons based on state

section_collapse_expand.details: New sections are collapsed by default and can be expanded by clicking

backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file: PASS - Returns all new sections with correct structure
